'''valacha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coadoration|coadoration]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coadoration|coadoration]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| valacha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vælæchæth|vælæchæth]] || [[word:vælæchæj|vælæchæj]] || [[word:vælæchæsh|vælæchæsh]] || [[word:vælæchæ|vælæchæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:valalachath|valalachath]] || [[word:valalachaj|valalachaj]] || [[word:valalachash|valalachash]] || [[word:valalacha|valalacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:valachath|valachath]] || [[word:valachaj|valachaj]] || [[word:valachash|valachash]] || [[word:valacha|valacha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:valafchath|valafchath]] || [[word:valafchaj|valafchaj]] || [[word:valafchash|valafchash]] || [[word:valafchaf|valafchaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:valachatha|valachatha]] || [[word:valachaja|valachaja]] || [[word:valachasha|valachasha]] || [[word:valachaka|valachaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:valachath|valachath]] || [[word:valachaj|valachaj]] || [[word:valachash|valachash]] || [[word:valacha|valacha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:valachathal|valachathal]] || [[word:valachajal|valachajal]] || [[word:valachashal|valachashal]] || [[word:valachakal|valachakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:valachathatha|valachathatha]] || [[word:valachajaja|valachajaja]] || [[word:valachashasha|valachashasha]] || [[word:valachaka|valachaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:valachathan|valachathan]] || [[word:valachajan|valachajan]] || [[word:valachashan|valachashan]] || [[word:valachakan|valachakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:valachathaoro|valachathaoro]] || [[word:valachajaoro|valachajaoro]] || [[word:valachashaoro|valachashaoro]] || [[word:valachakaoro|valachakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
